description.p: Word Hunter is a language-learning workspace for reading real texts, saving vocabulary with context, and reviewing words later.
It supports imported text, PDFs, EPUB files, subtitles, local vocabulary storage, spaced repetition, text to speech, and optional offline translation models.

screenshot.caption: Reading view with vocabulary highlights and word details

ul.li: Make later vocabulary status decisions win reliably across synchronized devices.
Merge notes and translations without restoring stale word statuses.
Reduce Android startup work and bundle the initial JavaScript graph.
Restrict Android cleartext networking to the local Word Hunter backend.
Fix flashcard word and sentence speech so it follows the visible card.
Keep the desktop Word Panel synchronized with keyboard navigation.
Restore spoken-word highlighting for Edge TTS on Windows.
Add and document desktop Reader keyboard shortcuts.
Add exact-word Reader bookmarks and restore the last reading position.
Harden synchronization, backups, imports, and custom-book persistence.
Improve Android synchronization, text-to-speech controls, and conflict resolution.
Add validated Apple Silicon, AppImage, DEB, Snap, AUR, and Nix packaging paths.
Keep Reader playback anchored to the selected word.
Delay the first in-text review of newly learned words until the following day.
Correct Italian interface copy and built-in reader titles.
